description:
John Zenon, a 35-year-old commercial diver, experienced an uncontrolled rapid ascent from 30 meters depth and presents with severe deep joint pain in his right shoulder and elbow ('the bends'). As the occupational health officer, complete his incident documentation in GNU Health: 
1. Document the condition of Decompression Sickness / Caisson disease (ICD-10: T70.3 or related T70.x code) as an active condition.
2. Create a new patient evaluation/encounter recording his acute vital signs (Heart Rate: 95 bpm, Respiratory Rate: 20, Oxygen Saturation: 98%).
3. Prescribe acute supportive therapy: Medical Oxygen (100% O2) or Sodium Chloride (IV fluids).
4. Order at least 2 baseline laboratory tests (e.g., Arterial Blood Gas [ABG], Complete Blood Count [CBC], or Comprehensive Metabolic Panel [CMP]).
5. Schedule a medical appointment for reassessment in 1 to 2 days from today.
Login credentials: Username: admin, Password: gnusolidario.
